alerts.title: Action Items — Emelia
items: Glendower 2026-27 fee schedule — review and plan payment arrangements
Upcoming school applications — monitor email for responses
DoodleEnglish & DoodleMaths login — encourage Emelia to log in weekly

cards.title: Glendower 2026-27 Fee Schedule
cards.text: The updated fee schedule for the 2026-27 academic year has been published. Review the new rates and plan payment arrangements accordingly.

cards.title: School Application Status
cards.text: Monitor inbox for responses from Kensington Prep and other schools. Ensure all required documentation is submitted and watch for interview invitations.

cards.title: DoodleEnglish & DoodleMaths
cards.text: Encourage Emelia to log in to DoodleEnglish and DoodleMaths regularly for practice.

cards.title: Co-parenting Communication
cards.text: Maintain regular communication with Honglin regarding Emelia's schedule, school updates, and upcoming arrangements. Coordinate any schedule changes in advance.

cards.title: Upcoming Direct Debit Payment
cards.text: Caddi Club Chelsea is charging £7.50 via Direct Debit on or shortly after April 27, 2026. Appears as "CaddiClub Chelsea" on your statement.

cards.title: Recent Bookings
cards.text: Multiple Bay 3 Peak bookings confirmed at Caddi Club Chelsea. Please cancel if unable to attend as a courtesy to other members.

cards.title: The Masters Event at Wimbledon
cards.text: The Masters Event at Wimbledon with Wimbledon Caddi Club was scheduled for 7:00 PM. This was a previous event.

alerts.title: Upcoming Deadlines
items: Rose & Thistle sign-up closes Sunday, 26 April — limited spots available
2026-27 subscription bill available to view — review and plan payment

cards.title: Rose & Thistle – 75th Year
cards.text: Annual Rose & Thistle competition marking 75 years. Online sign-up closes this Sunday. Don't miss the opportunity to participate in this special milestone event.

cards.title: Members Information Evening Presentation
cards.text: Presentation file from the recent member's information evening is available to view. Check email for the link to access the presentation materials.

cards.title: 2026-27 Subscription Bill
cards.text: Your 2026-27 subscription bill is now available online. Review the charges and plan your payment arrangement accordingly.

cards.title: Weekly Club Update
cards.text: This week's update from Malden Golf Club to help you get prepared for the season ahead. Check for tips and upcoming events.

cards.title: Sports Psychology Research Study
cards.text: Invitation to participate in a Sports Psychology MSc research project at University of Madrid exploring psychological factors in golf performance.
